dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.description: A compact financial overview will appear here in later iterations.

accounts.title: Accounts
accounts.description: Cash, bank cards, and other accounts will be managed here.

transactions.title: Transactions
transactions.description: Manual income and expense tracking will be managed here.

categories.title: Categories
categories.description: Income and expense categories will be configured here.

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Workspace, profile, and interface settings will be managed here.

placeholder.statusValue: Skeleton ready for the next iteration

deleteConfirm.title: Delete workspace?
deleteConfirm.description: All accounts, categories, and transactions in this workspace will also be deleted. This action cannot be undone.

errors.nameTaken: A workspace with this name already exists.
errors.forbidden: Only the workspace owner can do this.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

financialAccounts.title: Accounts
financialAccounts.emptyDescription: Create your first account to start tracking your finances.

deleteConfirm.title: Delete account?
deleteConfirm.description: All transactions for this account will also be deleted. This action cannot be undone.

errors.nameTaken: An account with this name already exists.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

categories.emptyDescription: Create your first category to classify transactions.

deleteConfirm.title: Delete category?
deleteConfirm.description: Transactions using this category will not be deleted. This action cannot be undone.

errors.nameTaken: A category with this name and type already exists.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

transactions.emptyDescription: Add your first transaction to start tracking income and expenses.
transactions.emptyNoAccountsHint: Go to the Accounts section and add at least one account.
transactions.emptyNoCategoriesHint: Go to the Categories section and add at least one category.
transactions.emptyFiltered: No transactions match the selected filters.

createModal.noAccounts: No accounts. Create one in the Accounts section.
createModal.noCategoriesForType: No categories for this type. Create them in the Categories section.

deleteConfirm.title: Delete transaction?
deleteConfirm.description: This action cannot be undone. The account balance will be recalculated.

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
